Video.summary: The Beach Boy arrives in LA and begins to kill drug dealers. Hunter and McCall must figure out his next move.
Video.title: The Beach Boy

Video.summary: A mentally disturbed surveillance expert attempts to "help" Hunter by killing a suspect and a witness.
Video.title: The Avenging Angel

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall pursue a convicted murderer who is free and has vowed to kill the jurors who convicted him.
Video.title: Guilty

Video.summary: A cocaine dealer being escorted by an obnoxious detective escapes. Hunter and the detective pursue her.
Video.title: The Snow Queen, Part 1

Video.summary: The pursuit of the cocaine dealer continues and the plot thickens as Hunter and McCall's cases collide.
Video.title: The Snow Queen, Part 2

Video.summary: Appearances are deceiving, when Reno discovers a look alike is committing crimes in his name.
Video.title: The Two Renos

Video.summary: Reno rolls into town, tracking a gang of vicious cutthroats.
Video.title: Billy

Video.summary: A desperate psychotic escapes from a prison with a plan for revenge against the men who put him behind bars: Reno and Bobby.
Video.title: Headcase

Video.summary: Rita and Chris are not quite convinced that a double murder in a hairstyling salon is a mob hit.
Video.title: Blo-Dri

Video.summary: Lance and Lorenzo look beyond the bedside manner of a young society doctor when he is brutally murdered.
Video.title: Intensive Care

Video.summary: Rita is stunned when her ex, a major league player, is suspected of murdering a club owner.
Video.title: Squeeze Play

Video.summary: Rita and Chris probe a fan who admits to killing the girlfriend of a brash radio star.
Video.title: Shock Jock

Video.summary: A commander kills his wife’s lover, then frames Chris and Rita by manipulating a D.A. and evidence.
Video.title: Witness

Video.summary: Chris is suspended for shooting an unarmed thief as the victim’s mother plots unexpected revenge.
Video.title: Domestic Agenda

Video.summary: When Reno and Cheyenne pose as newlyweds, their intimate feelings for each other become apparent.
Video.title: Another Place And Time

Video.summary: Reno teams up with Dutch Dixon's vengeful son to bring Dutch to justice--but the son may be just as devious as the father.
Video.title: Sins Of The Father

Video.summary: Reno investigates a parolee who claims he was wrongly accused of rape.
Video.title: No Place Like Home

Video.summary: Reno's latest job gets personal - the bounty is on the head of Earl Lyons, an ex-Army Ranger from Reno's unit.
Video.title: Lyon's Roar

Video.summary: Reno falls into a deadly trap when false news reports claim that Valerie Prentice, his comatose fiancee, has awakened.
Video.title: Val's Song

Video.summary: Reno assists a stranded motorist change her flat tire who later turns up dead.
Video.title: Give And Take

Video.summary: Reno's latest bounty kidnaps a wealthy Japanese businessman's daughter.
Video.title: Samurai

Video.summary: A rapist returns to haunt Chris for sending him to jail.
Video.title: Good Time Charlie

Video.summary: A Palm Beach society outcast is murdered as he is about to reveal something he says will rock the community. Chris and Rita go undercover to find out the secret.
Video.title: Social Call

Video.summary: Rita and Chris get involved when a wealthy over-sexed Palm Beach businessman puts out a contract on a smalltime loser who is partially responsible for the death of a woman in the businessman's well-paid harem.
Video.title: Wild Card

Video.summary: Chris and Rita investigate the murder of a vice cop, and Chris must deal with the victim's son.
Video.title: In Too Deep

Video.summary: Two brothers are suspected of brutally murdering their parents.
Video.title: Bad Blood

Video.summary: Chris and Rita confront a bizarre burglary ring involving the mob, murder and Chris' quirky snitch Dunn.
Video.title: Hot Rocks
